description: Customer-facing lens: does the product make me look good live in front of customers, drive adoption, and prevent churn?

stops.label: prospect-scorecard
stops.note: The 'pull up your scorecard' demo moment: is this impressive in the first 60 seconds, or does it invite an accuracy fight?

stops.label: prospect-scorecard-2
stops.note: Second prospect view: consistency of the wow-factor across companies.

stops.label: report-center
stops.note: Exports a CSM sends after a call: are they branded, current, and QBR-ready without manual deck work?

stops.label: home-vendor-engagement
stops.note: Vendor Engagement tab: what the customer's vendors experience — invite flows, responsiveness.

stops.label: marketplace
stops.note: Integrations: how easily does this land inside a customer's existing stack (Jira, ServiceNow, Slack)?

stops.label: verified-assessments
stops.note: Early Access surface: how are new features introduced? Would I demo this confidently?

stops.label: notifications
stops.note: Notification center: would a customer see value here weekly, or churn-inducing noise?
